metadata.title: Heroes — The Virtual Odyssey
metadata.description: Transform every step into a journey. Discover Japan's most iconic routes through an interactive 3D experience and earn real premium medals.
metadata.ogTitle: Heroes — Every step becomes a journey.
metadata.ogDescription: A purpose-driven virtual challenge platform. Move through Japan's history in 3D and leave a lasting legacy.

hero.label: The Virtual Odyssey · 2026
hero.title: Every step becomes a journey.
hero.subtitle: Discover Japan's most iconic routes through an interactive 3D experience. Move through history, earn real rewards, and leave a lasting legacy.

medal.label: A Token of Achievement
medal.title: Beyond the digital screen.
medal.description: True achievements deserve more than a badge. Complete your odyssey and receive a premium physical medal, crafted with precision and shipped to your door.

maps.title: Interactive Maps
maps.description: Explore Japan with high-fidelity Mapbox maps in three distinct styles.

impact.title: Real-time Impact
impact.description: Track your steps as they translate into trees planted and plastic removed.

medals.title: Physical Medals
medals.description: Earn premium physical artifacts shipped globally upon completion.

teams.title: Team Journeys
teams.description: Collaborate with friends in real-time chat and shared leaderboards.

achievements.title: Global Achievements
achievements.description: Unlock 10 categories of achievements with 5 rarity tiers.

inclusivity.title: 12 Activity Types
inclusivity.description: Whether you walk, run, or roll, every movement counts.

challenges.label: 01 / Explore
challenges.description: Choose your path through the heart of Japan. Each route is a unique journey of discovery.

fuji.title: Mt. Fuji
fuji.subtitle: Conquer the sacred peak of Japan.

ronin.title: Ronin
ronin.subtitle: Follow the path of the masterless warrior.

rail.title: Railway
rail.subtitle: Journey through the historic rail routes.

sakura.title: Sakura
sakura.subtitle: A seasonal journey through cherry blossoms.
